top_signals.title: A Billion Dollars of Leveraged SpaceX Bets Hit ETFs in One Day
top_signals.summary: Leveraged bets on SpaceX generated more than $1 billion of trading volume on their first day, as investors rushed to amplify wagers on the biggest IPO in history, underscoring the extraordinary retail appetite surrounding Elon Musk’s newest public company.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: L3Harris Missile Arm Axyv Picks JPMorgan, Morgan Stanley for IPO
top_signals.summary: L3Harris Technologies Inc., one of the largest US defense contractors, has selected banks to lead the initial public offering for Axyv, its missile unit, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SoftBank launches OpenAI cybersecurity in Japan as US restricts rival model
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Prediction market traders speculate Anthropic will restore access quickly to AI model after Trump admin directed it to limit reach
top_signals.summary: Traders think it's more likely than not that access is restored by July 1.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
